title: Issue with SPARQL insert
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph1 (s VARCHAR, category VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO graph1 (s, category) SELECT s, 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar' FROM graph1 WHERE category LIKE '%bar' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM graph1 WHERE s = graph1.s AND category = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar');
SELECT s FROM graph1 WHERE category = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar';
key_bug_features: SPARQL INSERT with complex WHERE clause fails
